english: During production, the robot waits at the pick position even though the part is present. The PLC input from the part sensor is active, but the robot program is still waiting for permission.
pattern: Time phrase + present simple + even though + present simple. Present simple + but + present continuous.
similarExample: During operation, the conveyor stops even though the safety signal is active. The PLC output is on, but the motor is still waiting for a start command.

english: The PLC output for "Robot Start" is active, but the robot does not begin the cycle. The robot is in automatic mode and there is no active alarm.
pattern: Present simple + but + present simple. Present simple + and + there is/are.
similarExample: The start signal is active, but the conveyor does not move. The drive is ready and there is no fault message.

english: I identified an unstable sensor signal, checked the wiring and PLC input, replaced the faulty sensor, and tested the system before restarting production.
pattern: Subject + sequence of past simple verbs + before + verb-ing.
similarExample: I found a loose connection, repaired the cable, verified the input signal, and tested the machine before returning it to production.

english: The production line stopped three times during the shift because the same sensor gave an intermittent signal. The engineer cleaned the sensor, checked the cable and monitored the PLC input. The fault disappeared after the damaged cable was replaced.
pattern: Past simple + because + past simple. Sequence of past simple actions. Past simple + after + passive past simple.
similarExample: The machine stopped repeatedly because a proximity switch produced an unstable signal. The technician inspected the connector, monitored the input and replaced the damaged wire. The problem disappeared after the repair was completed.

english: The robot receives the start signal, but it does not move because one safety zone is not clear.
pattern: Present simple + but + present simple + because + present simple.
similarExample: The conveyor receives the run command, but it does not start because the safety gate is still open.

english: I programmed the robots, developed the PLC logic, created HMI alarms and supported commissioning.
pattern: Subject + sequence of past simple verbs + objects.
similarExample: I configured the drives, prepared the HMI screens, tested the safety functions and supported the startup process.

english: The robot completes the weld, but the PLC does not receive the "weld complete" signal. The robot output is active on the pendant, but the PLC input remains off.
pattern: Present simple + but + present simple. Present simple + but + present simple.
similarExample: The robot finishes the operation, but the PLC does not receive the cycle-complete signal. The output is active on the controller, but the corresponding PLC input stays off.
